tasks.build: mkdir -p static/js && deno bundle --platform browser --minify -o static/js/auth-hub.js src/client/apps/auth-hub/entry.tsx && deno bundle --platform browser --minify -o static/js/social-care.js src/client/apps/social-care/entry.tsx && deno bundle --platform browser --minify -o static/js/registration.js src/client/apps/registration/entry.tsx && deno bundle --platform browser --minify -o static/js/family-composition.js src/client/apps/family-composition/entry.tsx
